name: triboon
description: Press play on anything. Triboon mounts the best healthy NZB from your usenet provider and streams it instantly.

scripts.test: node --test --test-force-exit test/e2e.test.js test/archive.test.js test/phase2.test.js test/security.test.js test/phase4.test.js test/iptv-cache.test.js test/library-db.test.js
